templates.name: Social Media Engagement
templates.text:
Hello Team,

We have made a couple of posts on our social handles:
• Reel featuring Abhijit Sir and the Sony ZV-E10 II
• GoPro Mission 1 Pro Stills
• GoPro Mission 1 Pro Reel
• BuySell website tips for both buyers and sellers as individual posts.

Please support each post by engaging with them across all platforms. A minimum like on each platform is mandatory. Sharing the post or leaving a comment wherever possible is appreciated.

Please engage on the following platforms:

• Instagram: https://instagram.com/primesandzooms
• Facebook: https://facebook.com/primesandzooms
• LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/primes-and-zooms
• YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/primeszoomspune
• Telegram: https://t.me/primesnzooms

Once you have completed engagement on all platforms, please react ✅ to this post to confirm that it is done.

templates.name: EOS R6 V (Reel + Stills Reminder)
templates.text:
Hi <Name>,

We have made a new post on our social handles:
• Reel/Video featuring the new Canon EOS R6 V (Video-First Mirrorless with 7K RAW)
• For anyone who missed engaging with our previous post (the stills post for the Canon EOS R6 V), kindly finish it up today and confirm.

Please support the post by engaging with it across all platforms. A minimum like on each platform is mandatory. Sharing the post or leaving a comment wherever possible is appreciated.

Please engage on the following platforms:
